title: FlyCountdown
description: Adds countdowns for timed flight with /fly.
body:
FlyCountdown 1.2.2

Simple, smooth, and powerful flight control for your server.

Made by drafterplus

What is FlyCountdown?

FlyCountdown lets you give players temporary flight time (like 30 minutes or 1 hour). It works great for Survival, RPG, or Skyblock servers where you want flight to be a reward, not a permanent perk.

Version 1.2 has been completely rebuilt to look better, run faster, and be easier to use.

Dependencies

  • Vault (Required for the Shop feature)
  • PlaceholderAPI (Optional, but supported for external use)

Features

  • Smooth & Simple: Built for modern Minecraft versions (1.20+) with no lag.
  • Visual Timer: Shows a clean digital timer in the action bar above the hotbar.
  • Flight Shop: Let players buy flight time using in-game money.
  • Easy Settings: Toggle sounds, particles, and features using a GUI.
  • Customizable: Full support for Hex colors and gradients.

Flight Shop GUI

Settings GUI

Commands

  • /fly — Toggle your own flight.
  • /fly shop — Open the flight time purchase GUI.
  • /fly settings — Open the GUI to toggle plugin features.
  • /fly check [player] — Check remaining flight time.
  • /fly add <player> <time> — Add flight time (e.g., 10m, 1h).
  • /fly take <player> <time> — Remove flight time.
  • /fly toggle <player> — Toggle flight for another player.
  • /fly blockworld <world> — Block/Unblock flight in a specific world.
  • /fly reload — Reload the configuration file.

Permissions

  • FlyCountdown.fly — Allow using /fly (Default: everyone).
  • FlyCountdown.fly.inf — Unlimited flight time & "Inf" in action bar (Default: OP).
  • FlyCountdown.admin — Access to settings, debug, and adding/taking time (Default: OP).
  • FlyCountdown.check — Allow checking own/others' time (Default: everyone).
  • FlyCountdown.toggle — Allow toggling others' flight (Default: OP).
  • FlyCountdown.reload — Allow reloading the config (Default: OP).

PlaceholderAPI Placeholders

  • %flycountdown_time% — Formatted time (e.g., 5m 30s or ∞).
  • %flycountdown_time_digital% — Digital clock format (e.g., 05:30 or ∞).
  • %flycountdown_time_seconds% — Raw seconds remaining.
  • %flycountdown_percent% — Percentage of time remaining (0-100).
  • %flycountdown_enabled% — Returns true or false.
  • %flycountdown_is_flying% — Returns true if the player is currently airborne.

Internal Placeholders

Used within config.yml messages:

  • %time% — Automatically shows the relevant time.
  • %player% — Automatically shows the target player's name.
  • {world} — Shows the world name (used in world block messages).
